title: Lunch Together
content: Emma forgot her lunch at home, so she decided to eat at a nearby café. While looking for a table, she saw Noah eating alone and asked if she could join him. They talked about work, favorite foods, and weekend plans. They laughed so much that they almost forgot to return to the office. After that day, eating lunch together became a regular tradition. What started as a simple meal slowly became the beginning of a beautiful relationship.
